Yu-Gi-Oh (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,762,690Details
International Box Office $8,952,313
Worldwide Box Office $28,715,003
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,485,494 (48.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,411 opening theaters/2,411 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,061,480

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 13th, 2004 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 16th, 2004 (Wide), released as Yu-Gi-Oh! (Australia)
June 12th, 2018 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: November 16th, 2004 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for scary combat and monster images.
Running Time: 100 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Anime
Plot point: Good vs. Evil, Monster
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Hand Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production Countries: Japan
Languages: Japanese
